question: Paul tells the church that they are something sacred as a community and that someone lives among them. What does Paul call them, and who does he say dwells in them?

choices.A: God’s temple, and God’s Spirit dwells in them
choices.B: God’s kingdom, and angels dwell in them
choices.C: God’s synagogue, and Moses dwells in them
choices.D: God’s army, and human courage dwells in them

teaching.title: The community as God’s temple
teaching.body: Paul says the believers (plural) are God’s temple and that God’s Spirit dwells in them.
